content.en:
The small world of chaos was located at the edge of the universe, but what shocked Ye Tian was that this small world of chaos was no longer on the edge of the human territory, but near the edge of the territory of the Doma race, a medium race in the universe, and it was still a little far away from the territory of the human race.

Through the conversation with Li Xin'er, Ye Tian learned a secret.

That is, the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain controlled the Doma Clan, a middle race, but it was secretly controlled, and the other universe races did not know about it, and it was the upper echelons of the human race who really knew.

The reason why Li Xin'er was willing to tell Ye Tian this secret was also because Ye Tian's identity was special, and he had made a great contribution to the human race, even much greater than the contributions of some high-level people.

Therefore, it doesn't matter if you tell Ye Tian.

This time, the candidates for entering the chaotic small world are basically the great god level of the chaotic yuan world, but there are few true god levels, and one of them is Ye Tian.

In addition, Li Xin'er also went to the small world of chaos.

As the young master of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain, Li Xin'er's safety was naturally the top priority, but the fact that the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain would allow Li Xin'er to enter such a dangerous place as the Chaos Small World really surprised Ye Tian.

However, after all, Li Xin'er is a cultivator at the peak of the ninth order of the great god level, and her combat power is very strong, and it is the highest cultivation that the small world of chaos can allow, Ye Tian is only at the peak of the true god level now, and her real combat power may not be as good as Li Xin'er.

------------

The Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain arranged an Origin Artifact Warship to carry Ye Tian and the others to the Chaos Small World.

Ye Tian observed, there were about 1,000 people at the great god level arranged by the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain this time, and there were several masters among the powerhouses who accompanied him, as for whether there was a Tianzun or a Supreme Zun accompanying him, Ye Tian was not very clear.

At the level above the master, if you deliberately hide it, it will be difficult to observe the other party even if you copy the talent.

A few days later.

The Origin Artifact Ship descended on the edge of the Doma territory, but did not sail into the Doma Clan.

Although the Doma clan is a medium race controlled by the human hybrid god mountain, after all, there are still eyes and ears of other races in the clan, in case a human race warship sails into the Doma clan and attracts the attention of other universe clans, this is not a good thing.

As a result, the Origin Artifact Warship then sailed directly to the void where the Chaos Small World was located.

Not much longer.

The Origin Artifact Warship stopped, and the Masters came out.

Woohoo!!

Ye Tian and the others came out of the Origin Artifact Warship one by one and looked at the void in front of them, but they couldn't sense the existence of the chaotic small world.

In this regard, Ye Tian was not surprised at all.

Although the chaotic small world was swallowed by the universe, it existed in the depths of space after all, and it was not so easy to sense.

But Ye Tian still sensed the difference in this void, the stability of the space here far exceeded that of other voids, and there was obviously an abnormal situation.

"Later, a few of us will join forces to open the passage of the small world of chaos, and you will take the opportunity to enter. In order not to be discovered, the spatial passage will only be open for a while, so you must hurry up and get in. "

One of the Juggernauts spoke.

"Yes!"

Many great gods nodded in response.

Thundered!!!

Several masters made a move, instantly tearing this piece of void and creating a passage.

As soon as this passage opened, a large amount of chaotic energy poured in.

"It's such a pure Chaos Element, and it's still a Chaos Vitality that hasn't been assimilated!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Once the Chaos Yuan Qi enters the universe, it will be assimilated and become an ordinary Chaos Yuan Qi, losing the true essence of the Chaos Yuan Qi.

And this is the case with the chaotic energy that appeared in this passage, which has always existed in the chaotic small world, and has not yet been in contact with the external vitality, so it has not been assimilated.

But this kind of chaotic vitality is also very violent, and it is difficult for ordinary people to absorb it.

But Ye Tian has a chaotic physique, and he is a chaotic avenue, so he can absorb the chaotic vitality here.

"Get in!"

The words of the Lords came.

Whew!!!

A god-level speedy shuttle through the passage and entered the small world of chaos.

Ye Tian and Li Xin'er also entered the passage for the first time, and soon came to the small world of chaos.

......

Knock knock knock!!

In the distance, huge creatures appeared in everyone's sight.

Most of these creatures are creatures at the peak of the Great God level, and their breath is far beyond the ordinary Great God level.

Ye Tian and the others had just entered the chaotic small world when they saw this scene, and their faces suddenly changed slightly.

Obviously, this is supposed to be the territory of some group of chaotic creatures, and the passage happens to open up here.

"Can't delay the battle here, rush out!"

Li Xin'er said.

"Yes, young master!"

Many great gods responded one after another.

The battle is on!

The great god level who can be qualified to enter here is a great god level with a fairly good strength of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and in the past, when he was at the emperor level, he was definitely a Tianjiao above seven stars.

In the outside world, it is almost a god-level of the first sequence.

But the creatures here are almost chaotic creatures, they are creatures from chaos, and their combat effectiveness naturally cannot be measured by the creatures in the universe.

As soon as the battle broke out, Ye Tian was shocked to find that the combat power of these creatures was very strong, basically seven or eight chaotic creatures were enough to compete with a great god-level.

And there are too many chaotic creatures here, if the battle continues, this group of great gods will definitely be wiped out.

Suddenly.

A huge chaotic creature rushed towards Ye Tian.

Curious, Ye Tian used the copying talent to check its talent.

Species: Mixed Sky Mammoth

Bloodline Talent: Universe level

Strength Talent: God

Speed Talent: Armaged

Defense Talent: God-level

Gravity Talent: God

Collision Talent: Armaged

Roar Talent: Arcane

Earth Trampling Talent: God-level

......

"Very nice talent!"

Ye Tian praised.

But soon, Ye Tian discovered a secret.

The power of these chaotic mammoths far surpassed some god-level creatures in the universe, and the two were not at the same level at all.

In an instant, Ye Tian understood.

In the universe, the physical bodies of strong people above the god level are basically fixed, and there is no way to improve the physical strength, which is the limit of the universe, and can only improve the divine power and soul.

It is said that only after the success of the impact on the cosmic god will the physical body transform once, improve some strength, but it will not be too weak, and then after becoming the realm of Tianzun, the physical body will also metamorphose.

But no matter how you transform, the strength of your physical body will not be too exaggerated.

But these chaotic mammoths are different, although they are only at the god level, their physical strength far exceeds the god level in the universe.

"Could it be that in the chaos, the strength of the physical body is not limited, and it can continue to improve?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If that's the case, then the chaos creatures here are terrifying.

Perhaps these chaotic creatures are just the lowest-level of the chaotic small world, and if you encounter those extremely powerful god-level chaotic creatures, it will be troublesome.

"Rush out first!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
